llmResponse.agenda_changes: At the start of the meeting, during the approval of agenda section, the board moved items 12.1, 12.3, and 12.4 to the consent agenda. Item 12.1 appears to be Board Officers' Rotation items, 12.3 is the Retirement Notification Incentive, and 12.4 is the Adoption of 2021 Educator Effectiveness Block Grant Plan. These were removed from discussion items and added to consent.
llmResponse.consent_vote_words: Do I have a motion to approve? So moved. Second. Okay, Maria made the motion. Janet seconded it. Roll call vote, please.
